skill.name: converting-email-templates
skill.description: Use when converting or migrating email templates from another provider (SendGrid, Mailgun, Mandrill, Postmark, Brevo, Amazon SES) to Mailtrap-compatible Handlebars syntax. Supports single file, bulk directory, and inline HTML conversion.
skill.summary: Automated conversion of email templates from providers like SendGrid, Mailgun, Mandrill, Postmark, Brevo, and Amazon SES to Mailtrap Handlebars format.
skill.author: mailtrap

security_audit.summary: All 434 static analysis findings are false positives. The skill is a legitimate Mailtrap tool for converting email templates. The external_commands findings are markdown documentation showing API endpoint references and shell command examples in code blocks. The network findings are references to docs.mailtrap.io and Mailtrap API endpoints in the documentation. The obfuscation findings are Handlebars template syntax (double curly braces) in documentation files. The Python converter script uses regex-based pattern substitution on template files - it reads HTML files, applies conversion rules, and writes output. The script does not make network requests, execute arbitrary code, or exfiltrate data. The documentation references environment variables for Mailtrap API tokens, which is expected for a tool that interacts with the Mailtrap platform. No prompt injection or malicious intent detected.

content.user_title: Convert email templates to Mailtrap Handlebars
content.value_statement: Migrating email templates between providers requires converting different template syntaxes. This skill automates the conversion from SendGrid, Mailgun, Mandrill, Postmark, Brevo, and Amazon SES to Mailtrap-compatible Handlebars format.
actual_capabilities: Converts single email template files from supported providers to Handlebars syntax
Processes entire directories of HTML template files in batch mode
Converts inline HTML pasted directly in chat using LLM intelligence
Flags unsupported patterns like date formatting and comparison helpers for manual review
Generates conversion reports showing exactly what changed and what needs attention
Maps API field names from the source provider to Mailtrap equivalents
limitations: Cannot convert custom Handlebars helpers like formatDate, greaterThan, or lessThan
Does not migrate template metadata such as names, categories, or tags
Requires templates already exported as HTML from the source provider
Cannot process directories containing templates from multiple providers at once

use_cases.title: Migrate a single email template
use_cases.description: Convert one email template file from a supported provider to Mailtrap Handlebars format with a clear report of all changes.
use_cases.target_user: Developers migrating a few key templates

use_cases.title: Batch migrate a template library
use_cases.description: Process an entire directory of HTML templates in a single operation with a summary report and per-file flag details.

use_cases.title: Test inline template conversion
use_cases.description: Paste raw template HTML directly into chat for instant conversion without saving files to disk first.
use_cases.target_user: Developers testing syntax conversion on sample templates

prompt_templates.title: Convert a single template file
prompt_templates.prompt: Convert the email template at path/to/template.html from SendGrid to Mailtrap Handlebars syntax.
prompt_templates.scenario: Quick conversion of a single file from a known provider

prompt_templates.title: Batch convert a template directory
prompt_templates.prompt: Convert all HTML email templates in the directory ./templates/ from Brevo to Mailtrap Handlebars. Show the summary report.
prompt_templates.scenario: Migrating an entire folder of templates at once

prompt_templates.title: Convert inline template HTML
prompt_templates.prompt: Convert this Postmark email template to Mailtrap Handlebars: [paste template HTML here]
prompt_templates.scenario: Converting template HTML pasted directly in the conversation

prompt_templates.title: Review flagged patterns
prompt_templates.prompt: Review the flags from my Mandrill template conversion. Show me which patterns need application code changes and which can be fixed in the template.
prompt_templates.scenario: Handling conversion flags that require manual review or app-layer changes

output_examples.input: Convert my SendGrid welcome email template to Mailtrap Handlebars.
output_examples.output:
Converted: welcome.html
Changes: 3 | Flags: 1
Output: ./converted/welcome.html

Changes made:
1. {{insert name "default=Customer"}} converted to {{#if name}}{{name}}{{else}}Customer{{/if}}
2. {{insert plan}} converted to {{plan}}

Flags:
1. Line 15: {{formatDate created_at "MMMM DD, YYYY"}} - MANUAL: Date formatting is not supported. Format this date in your application code and pass the result as a template variable.

output_examples.input: Convert all templates in the ./email-templates/ directory from Brevo.
output_examples.output:
Converted: 5 files
Total changes: 12 | Total flags: 3
Clean: 3 files | Needs review: 2 files

Output: ./email-templates/converted/

Files needing review:
1. newsletter.html - 2 flags (nested loop detected)
2. receipt.html - 1 flag (filter syntax needs manual conversion)

output_examples.input: What API field changes do I need for Mandrill after converting my templates?
output_examples.output:
After converting your Mandrill templates, update your API send calls:

Old field: template_name
Old variables: global_merge_vars + merge_vars
Mailtrap field: template_uuid
Mailtrap variables: template_variables

Replace template_name references with template_uuid and merge_vars with template_variables in your sending code.

best_practices: Export the raw HTML source from your provider before starting the conversion process
Review all flagged patterns carefully as they often require application code changes
Test converted templates in the Mailtrap preview tool before sending to recipients
anti_patterns: Do not mix templates from different providers in the same input directory
Do not skip flagged patterns - they contain syntax the converter cannot handle
Do not attempt to convert custom Handlebars helpers in the template itself

faq.question: Which providers does this skill support for conversion?
faq.answer: It supports SendGrid, Mailgun, Mandrill (Handlebars and merge tags), Postmark, Brevo, and Amazon SES.

faq.question: What happens to custom Handlebars helpers in my templates?
faq.answer: Custom helpers like formatDate, greaterThan, and lessThan are flagged for manual review. These require changes in your application code, not in the template.

faq.question: Can I convert multiple templates at the same time?
faq.answer: Yes, point the skill to a directory of HTML files and it will process all of them in batch mode.

faq.question: What if I just want to test the conversion on one template?
faq.answer: Paste the raw HTML directly into chat for inline conversion without saving any files.

faq.question: Do I need a Mailtrap account to use this skill?
faq.answer: Yes, this skill converts templates to Mailtrap format for use with the Mailtrap Email API.

faq.question: Will my original template files be modified?
faq.answer: No, the skill never modifies original files. All converted output goes to a separate output directory.
